title: Bitter Fluffy Egyptian Spinach Stir-fry
description: This low-carb-friendly dish features bitter spinach combined with fluffy textures from creme fraiche in a one-pot cooking method inspired by traditional Egyptian cuisine.

ingredients.name: spinach
ingredients.amount: 1 cup fresh, washed and roughly chopped

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: enough to lightly coat a pan

ingredients.name: red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: optional, adds heat and depth of flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes if using. Stir until fragrant but not burnt, about 30 seconds.
Add roughly chopped spinach to the pan. Stir continuously to prevent sticking and quickly wilt the leaves.
Once wilted, reduce heat to low, then add cream fraiche. Mix well so it coats all of the spinach evenly.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly and the spinach is fluffy in texture but still retains some bite from being briefly cooked.
